page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Graphical pan-genome analysis with suffix skips.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: An algorithm that directly constructs the compressed de Bruijn graph in time and space linear to the total number of genomes for a given maximum genome size.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An algorithm that directly constructs the compressed de Bruijn graph in time and space linear to the total number of genomes for a given maximum genome size.
